scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=server && npm run test --workspace=client
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run test:e2e --workspace=client
scripts.smoke:ollama: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run smoke:ollama --workspace=server
scripts.smoke:ollama:verify: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run smoke:ollama:verify --workspace=server
scripts.mvp:ollama: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run mvp:ollama --workspace=server
scripts.mvp:ollama:verify: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run mvp:ollama:verify --workspace=server
scripts.mvp:benchmark: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run mvp:benchmark --workspace=server --
